key_actions_ordered: 1. IMAP SWEEP (before 09:00): Check leads 1/3/22 for warm pipeline outcomes. HANDS: these are 15-19 days overdue. Resolve today without fail.
2. EMAIL SENDS (09:00-10:15): fu_041-045 for leads 30/31/32/58/59. IMAP check before each individual send. Stagger 15 minutes.
3. CONFIRM TUESDAY SENDS in CHANGELOG.md: fu_036-040 status for leads 42/44/46/57/60. If any not sent: send immediately.
4. LINKEDIN SEARCHES (any time today before 15:00): 52 (Linda Walsh) → 55 (Craig Lawson) → 50 (Pete) → 56 (Neil). IMAP check before each. 10-minute limit per search.
5. WRITE linkedin_profiles.json AFTER EACH SEARCH — six BRAIN runs without this file. Last opportunity before campaign analysis phase.
6. HAND OFF BLOCKED LEADS: If Batch 5 Ryedale data not received today, campaign stalls from Friday. BRAIN will not run tomorrow unless Batch 5 data is returned.
summary.linkedin_profiles_escalation: SIX consecutive BRAIN runs without linkedin_profiles.json. Today is the last active pre-breakup LinkedIn day. HANDS: writing linkedin_profiles.json today is the single highest-impact action for the LinkedIn channel. Required format: [{lead_id, linkedin_url, headline, last_post_date, last_post_text, connection_status, active_within_60_days, profile_found}].
